_meta.one_line: Signal definitions are fully extractable (GREEN). Self-stored historical data is ~1 day, local-only, git-ignored, and carries NO settled price outcomes (RED for using as-is). Offline study is only startable after a batch backfill from an archive node / data vendor (YELLOW: medium engineering).

sqlite_db.conclusion: SQLite mirror was never populated / was reset. Unusable as a history source.

ndjson_archive.base_dir: app/data/archive/ (git-ignored, LOCAL-ONLY, not in version control)

delivery_audit.ndjson.all_rows_delivery_class: drop (this is the SUPPRESSED/gated-out event log, not fired signals)
delivery_audit.ndjson.value: best timestamped on-chain event record available locally; alignable to price via archive_ts + token + tx_hash

files.raw_events: 0 files (ARCHIVE_ENABLE_RAW_EVENTS tied to research tier; not retained here)

telegram_push_history_export.note: no telegram export file present. delivery_audit.ndjson is the de-facto delivery record but contains only DROP-class rows in this window (nothing was pushed).

settled_outcomes_present.evidence: reports/daily/daily_report_latest.json: outcome_30s/60s/300s_completed_count all 0; trade_opportunity_summary candidate/verified counts all 0; SQLite outcomes & opportunity_outcomes tables 0 rows.
settled_outcomes_present.implication: no ready-made event->price labels exist; price reaction must be reconstructed offline from an external price source.

archive_node_getLogs.availability: high (Alchemy already configured; archive getLogs by contract for Transfer/Swap/Mint/Burn)
archive_node_getLogs.cost: Alchemy CU (NOT spent in this recon beyond a permitted single-contract single-day probe, which was also skipped to be safe)
archive_node_getLogs.engineering: medium: re-derive intent_type with existing app/ classifiers (pipeline.py exchange logic, lp_analyzer.py) over historical logs; pools fixed (4) so getLogs scope is small; exchange-deposit needs Transfer logs filtered by the 19 watched / 4 exchange addresses
archive_node_getLogs.quality: high / canonical (raw chain data); reuses existing parsing code => definition parity
archive_node_getLogs.best_target: the 4 Uniswap V2 pools (ETH/WBTC) for LP signals + ERC20 Transfer logs touching exchange hot wallets for the deposit signal

dune.cost: low (free tier may suffice for 4 pools + a few addresses)
dune.engineering: medium (SQL + re-implement intent classify outside app code => definition drift risk)

the_graph.quality: good for LP, weak for arbitrary exchange-deposit address flows

allium_nansen.quality: high, has labeled CEX wallets (useful for exchange-deposit signal)

batch_backfill_options.recommended: archive-node getLogs replaying through existing app/ classifiers — preserves exact signal definitions and the pool set is tiny.

price_alignment.block_time_to_kline: delivery_audit/signals carry archive_ts (unix) and event ts; align to minute klines by floor(ts/60). System already prefers OKX perp mark at 30/60/300s offsets (sub-minute), so for finer study use OKX trades/1m candles.
price_alignment.price_source_in_repo: app/market_data_clients.py: OKX (okx_perp) primary, Kraken futures secondary, Binance/Bybit base URLs present but de-prioritized for US VPS.
price_alignment.monitored_majors_in_existing_price_lib: ETH and BTC (the LP pools are ETH/WBTC) are universally covered by any price lib incl. cta_strategy's 5/22-coin set; long-tail tokens (PEPE, etc.) may need supplemental price feeds.
price_alignment.note: cta_strategy price library was NOT inspected (separate repo, out of scope); ETH+BTC coverage is assumed-safe, long-tail must be confirmed.

tradeable_mapping.exchange_deposit_signal_assets: dynamic per watched-address token; needs per-token perp check. Observed tokens incl USDT/USDC (stable, no directional perp), WETH (ETH perp), PEPE (PEPE perp exists). Stablecoin-dominant flows (is_stablecoin_flow True in 1318/1758) are not directly directionally tradeable as the moved asset.

event_frequency_for_sample_sizing.caveat: these are pre-gate (mostly dropped). True actionable frequency after quality gate is far lower. Single day is far below the OPPORTUNITY_MIN_HISTORY_SAMPLES=20 the system itself requires.
event_frequency_for_sample_sizing.reaction_window_hint: system measures reaction at 30s/60s/300s => the operator's hypothesized edge is MINUTE-scale, consistent with the 'execution-latency killed it' framing.
